scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n web,companion "npm run dev --workspace @voice/web" "npm run dev --workspace @voice/companion"
scripts.dev:hosted: concurrently -k -n api,asr,summary "npm run dev --workspace @voice/api" "npm run dev --workspace @voice/asr-worker" "npm run dev --workspace @voice/summary-worker"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @voice/api && npm run build --workspace @voice/asr-worker && npm run build --workspace @voice/summary-worker && npm run build --workspace @voice/companion && npm run build --workspace @voice/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @voice/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @voice/asr-worker && npm run typecheck --workspace @voice/summary-worker && npm run typecheck --workspace @voice/companion && npm run typecheck --workspace @voice/web
